## ChocolateRole type

Role that a chocolate plays in a confection. Used for tracking chocolate selections during editing sessions.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type ChocolateRole = 'shell' | 'seal' | 'decoration' | 'enrobing' | 'coating';
```
